description_long: This is a classic black top hat with a tall, cylindrical crown and a flat top. The brim is wide, slightly curved downward at the edges, and encircles the base of the crown, providing a formal and distinguished appearance. The surface of the hat is smooth and has a subtle sheen, suggesting it is made from a high-quality fabric such as felt or satin. There are no visible decorative elements such as ribbons, feathers, or logos, giving it a minimalist and traditional look. The hat appears to be lightweight and hollow, designed to fit comfortably on a person's head. Its overall construction is sturdy, maintaining a crisp and structured silhouette.
description: A classic black top hat with a tall, flat-topped crown and a wide, slightly curved brim. The surface is smooth and subtly glossy, with no visible decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall, cylindrical crown and the wide, slightly downward-curved brim.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the smooth, continuous surface of the crown and the even curvature of the brim.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the hat's height and the uniform width of the brim around the crown.
description_view_3: Angled rear view emphasizing the hat's structured silhouette and the subtle sheen of the material.
attribute_brim_style: wide and flat with a slight downward curve
attribute_crown_shape: tall and cylindrical with a flat top
